message:
feat(model): add days_ago() helper for relative test timestamps

Provides days_ago(n) alongside the existing ts() helper for creating
test fixture timestamps relative to now. Useful for staleness-sensitive
tests that need dates N days in the past rather than absolute dates.

Analysis showed existing hard-coded dates do NOT cause failures because
staleness is computed relative to Utc::now() at test time, but the
helper enables better practice for future tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
